name: MOBIX LABS, INC
summary: PART I Company Overview Based in Irvine, California, Mobix Labs designs, develops and sells components and systems for advanced wireless and wired connectivity, radio frequency (RF), switching and electromagnetic interference (EMI) filtering technologies. Our solutions are used in the defense, aerospace, commercial, industrial and other markets.
